# Mummified Hand

## Live Text

- Description: Whenever you play a Power, a random card in your Hand is free to play that turn.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Wiki facts live above the divider. -->
- High-value shop relic when the deck has several cheap Powers; can turn setup turns with Rupture, Inflame, Feel No Pain, Pyre, or Unmovable into tempo instead of losing the turn.
- Re-read the hand immediately after each Power; the random free card can change whether the turn should block, burst, or continue setup.
